sources.name: Anthropic Claude Code slash commands
sources.implementation_use: Prompt packaging should support reusable, scoped command-style instructions; local agent can use /clear, /compact, /memory, /init, and project commands to manage context.

sources.name: Anthropic Claude Code memory
sources.implementation_use: Prompt package should embed frequently used commands, project architecture, and conventions so agents avoid repeated discovery.

sources.name: Anthropic Claude Code hooks reference
sources.implementation_use: Hooks can enforce guardrails but execute arbitrary shell commands; package must treat hook changes as out of scope unless explicitly authorized and security-reviewed.

sources.name: Microsoft SharePoint list view threshold
sources.implementation_use: Wave 15 list schemas must preserve indexed first-predicate query patterns and avoid uncontrolled list scans.

sources.name: Microsoft Graph throttling guidance
sources.implementation_use: Future Graph-backed live reads should avoid polling, obey Retry-After, and use change tracking/notifications when available; current package remains mock/read-model first.

sources.name: OWASP Open Redirect
sources.implementation_use: Launch URLs must use standard URL parsing and strict allowed-host policy, not string matching or blocklist-only checks.

sources.name: OWASP Clickjacking Defense Cheat Sheet
sources.implementation_use: Iframe/current-image embed behavior remains future-gated; default launch behavior should be new-tab/open-link with provider policy reviewed separately.

sources.name: WAI-ARIA modal dialog pattern
sources.implementation_use: Drawer and lineage panels require focus trap, Escape close, return focus, and keyboard navigation tests.

sources.name: Microsoft Viva Connections card design guidance
sources.implementation_use: Launch Pad should favor card/quick-view task completion and curated entry points rather than dense admin screens.

sources.name: TanStack Table sorting guide
sources.implementation_use: If table dependencies are already present or later authorized, sorting state should be controlled/manual when backend sorted; do not add dependency in this package without approval.
